title: ForPro Professional Collection Acrylic Apothecary Jar with Lid, 60 Oz Storage Container for Bathroom, Kitchen and Office, 7.75" x 5"
description:
About this item
Sturdy: Made of durable acrylic with form fitting lid to prevent dust and dirt from getting inside
Classic Style: Fits any room décor
Shatterproof: No worries like glass, if the jar drops, it will not shatter.
Perfect Room Accessory: You will love it in the bathroom, kitchen and office
Extra-Large Capacity: 60 oz. 7.75” x 5”
reviews_5s:
it’s so cute! It’s a good size and the lid stays on well. It works for what I am using it for and I’m only using it to hold scraps of paper. I’m don’t know how well it’ll do with other things though.Love these for storing my salts for bath!
Great quality and great price!I have an antique marble collection. These cannisters store the marbles in a way that I can daily enjoy them. They are terrific!Perfect desktop candy jarsThis cotton balls holder is by far the best product I purchased. It is bigger than competitors better priced and stylish. The material is very clear easy to clean and fits perfectly in any area I placed. It is such a good product I bought one for every bathroom.This is well made and feels durable, thanks!nice product, I like it, thank you for the fast shippingI got these to organize my bathroom. Ordered one originally and went back for a second as they were good quality!Looks nice with no fear of breaking it in the bathroom. I use it for bath salts and keep it next to the bath tub.Came in completely fine! I bought it to hold chocolates to be used for my expresso machine. I thought it was glass at first but felt more like plastic. Either way, it’s affordable and does the job!
reviews_1s:
A 3 lb bag of epsom salt (48 oz) will not fit in this jar. Just FYI that the size is inaccurate. It’s marked as a 60oz jar in the description and on the box, but it won’t hold that amount.The description says these are for the bath and aromatherapy. I started using these in March for storing epsom salts. But right away the salt coated the container and etched into the acrylic. I tried soaking them in hot water to remove the salt. I tried scraping the salt off the sides, but it is etched into the sides.
Because the salt is etched into the container, I can't use these for anything else. I can't store cotton pads, nor any textile. I can't use it for storing food. They are ruined and useless.
Too late to return them for a refund. So disappointed.Absolutely crap; size is too small, costs $6 to return.
Check Store; just because it's through Amazon, doesn't mean it's a free return.
